required_protocol_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
assignment: Independently inspect every subject script and input, verify hashes and exact-head provenance, replay the frozen checkpoint, and challenge the ownership claims. Confirm that scope.run owns its temporary context, managed ctx.exec reuses one default-boundary resource across two calls and closes it once at owning-context close, and SDK session.run drains its result then closes the owning runtime. Confirm post-close live resource count and cleanup business-state mutation count are zero. Do not edit product, subject evidence, or .okra. Do not accept throughput, allocation, or CKR performance claims.
stop_rule: Accept or reject each lifecycle row once from independent replay and stop.
output_schema: Claim-by-claim accepted/rejected verdicts with exact commands, values, provenance, and remaining blocked claims.
